items.title: Can I build multiple Crystal files in parallel?
items.author: kojix2
items.content:
ls -1 examples/*.cr | xargs -P 16 -I{} crystal build --release {}

Sometimes this does not work well. Could there be some kind of conflict?

Does anyone know about this?

items.title: Wierd issue with version 1.17.1
items.author: gdotdesign
items.content:
Hi folks I’ve run into an issue after upgrading to for Mint. I don’t have a reproducible code yet, but I decided to ask in hopes that someone here has an idea

Here are some information which I think might be relevant:

These are the steps to reproduce:

  • Create a project (once).
  • Set up the language server in your editor to use the local to be built binary (once).
  • Open in your editor and change something, so an error diagnostic is published.
  • If the error appears in the editor, it’s good, if it’s not, it’s bad.

This is what I found out after asking in Discord and then building Crystal from source and then building Mint with that:

If anyone could verify my results would be great! I only tested the Linux versions, both statically built ones from GitHub actions and locally built ones.
